input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.5.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.5.1.3
            TITLE: the minimum performance levels to score points may be adjusted by the officials.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.5.1.3: The minimum performance levels to score points may be adjusted by the Officials.
D.5.1.3 The minimum performance levels to score points may be adjusted by the Officials.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 128 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: The minimum performance levels to score points may be adjusted by the Officials.
